a.xlink:title: Sets input and output meshes carrying data to be mapped.
Returns true, if computeMapping() has been called.
Sets the coordinates of the vertex.
Computes the mapping coefficients from the in- and output mesh.
Maps input data to output data from input mesh to output mesh.
Returns pointer to input mesh.
Returns pointer to output mesh.
Checks whether the mapping has the given constraint or not.
True if this process is running a slave.
Sends a constructed mesh to the receiver with given rank.
True if this process is running the master.
Number of ranks. This includes ranks from both participants, e.g. minimal size is 2...
Receives a mesh from the sender with given rank. Adds received mesh to mesh.
Returns the constraint (consistent/conservative) of the mapping.
Returns modifieable container holding all vertices.
Creates and initializes a Vertex object.
Returns modifiable container holding all edges.
Returns the unique (among vertices of one mesh on one processor) ID of the vertex.
Creates and initializes an Edge object.
Returns modifiable container holding all triangles.
Returns the (among edges) unique ID of the edge.
Creates and initializes a Triangle object.
Checks whether both edges share a vertex.
Returns the name of the mesh, as set in the config file.
Deletes all dead directions from fullVector and returns a vector of reduced dimensionality.
Scales the consistently mapped output data such that the surface integral of the values on input mesh...
